description: CompositionOrange t-shirt with round neck and bold print across the front, made of 100% cotton Wash care1. Machine wash separately in cold water2. Use mild detergent3. Do not bleach4. Avoid soaking5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only7. Do not iron directly on printFittingRegularDancing eyes, looking all over the room to find the tiniest opportunity to make mischief - if this best describes your child then this orange tee from tantra is a perfect way warn the world. Made of pure cotton, this t-shirt will keep you kid dry and comfortable through all seasons while the adrenalin pumps through them all day long allowing them to make more mischief. Team this with denim or cargo shorts or pants and a pair of open sandals to allow your kid to make mischief in style.
